data.body:
Goal:
Add a typed execution-plan payload model to Knots, persist it through storage and sync, and expose supported CLI read/write surfaces so other tools can treat execution plans as structured data instead of freeform notes.

Verification:
1. In the Knots worktree, run targeted tests for payload round-tripping through the local database, event log/snapshot sync, rehydrate, and kno show --json serialization.
2. Run a CLI smoke check that writes payload data from a file and then reads it back to confirm typed fields survive persistence and sync boundaries.

Constraints:
- Model payload separately from workflow state. The payload owns runtime fields like status, waves, steps, assumptions, and beat ids.
- Add plan-specific CLI write support rather than hiding JSON in description or note fields.
- Add or preserve a provenance edge kind planned_by for work-knot -> execution_plan relationships without giving it parent_of semantics.
data.title: Persist execution_plan payload in Knots
